name: Platform Infrastructure Modernization
description: Complete platform modernization affecting architecture, security, and all processes
task: Modernize platform infrastructure: refactor architecture for scalability, establish security practices, improve code quality organization-wide, manage complex git workflows, version services consistently, scan for vulnerabilities, coordinate across 8+ teams.

coding_challenge.description: Write a platform modernizer handling architecture refactoring, quality standards, security practices, git workflows, versioning, dependency scanning, and team coordination. Accept platform config and return modernization roadmap.
